Specifically, at the fine-grained statement level, BugCerberus surpasses the state-of-the-art in Top-N (N=1, 3, 5, 10) by 16.5%, 5.4%, 10.2%, and 23.1%, respectively. Moreover, in the issue fixing experiments, BugCerberus improves the fix rate of the existing issue fixing approach Agentless by 17.4% compared to the best baseline, highlighting the significant impact of enhanced bug localization on automated issue fixing.
title_zh: 连接缺陷定位与问题修复：一种基于大语言模型的分层定位框架
abstract_zh:
自动化问题修复是软件调试中的关键任务，近年来在学术界和工业界都受到了广泛关注。然而，现有的修复技术主要集中在修复阶段，往往忽视了提升此前的缺陷定位阶段的重要性。作为问题修复的基础步骤，缺陷定位在决定整个修复流程整体效果方面起着至关重要的作用。

为提高大规模项目中问题修复的精确性，准确识别缺陷位置，本文提出了 BugCerberus——首个基于三个定制化大语言模型的分层缺陷定位框架。首先，BugCerberus在文件、函数和语句三个层级上分析与缺陷相关的程序的中间表示，并从中提取出与缺陷相关的上下文信息。其次，BugCerberus在每个层级上设计了三个定制化的大型语言模型（LLM），利用缺陷报告和上下文信息学习缺陷的模式。最后，BugCerberus通过经过精心调优的模型，分层搜索与缺陷相关的代码元素，实现三个层级上的缺陷定位。借助 BugCerberus，我们进一步研究了缺陷定位对问题修复效果的影响。

我们在广泛使用的基准数据集 SWE-bench-lite 上对 BugCerberus 进行了评估。实验结果表明，BugCerberus 在所有基线方法中表现最优。具体而言，在细粒度的语句层级上，BugCerberus 在 Top-N（N=1, 3, 5, 10）指标上分别优于当前最先进方法 16.5%、5.4%、10.2% 和 23.1%。此外，在问题修复实验中，与最佳基线相比，BugCerberus 将现有修复方法 Agentless 的修复成功率提升了 17.4%，充分凸显了增强缺陷定位对自动化问题修复所具有的显著影响。

title: LLM-Augmented Anomaly Detection with Isolation Forest and SHAP in Snowflake
authors: Vilas M V, Ramani Selvanambi
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent and Innovative Technologies in Computing, Electrical and Electronics (IITCEE)
abstract: In modern data-driven systems, detecting anomalies in server logs is vital for ensuring operational stability and security. This work presents a fully cloud-native anomaly detection and explainability pipeline built entirely within the Snowflake data platform. Starting from publicly available server log datasets, we preprocess and ingest the data using staged bulk insertions for efficient loading. Leveraging Snowflake's native Python execution, we engineer features and train an Isolation Forest model for unsupervised anomaly detection, accurately flagging abnormal server behaviors. SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) values interpret these anomalies by identifying key contributing features and clarifying whether the anomaly is driven by unusually high or low values. Finally, Snowflake Cortex's LLM capabilities are employed to auto-generate concise, human-readable insights, enabling seamless integration into analytical dashboards. This pipeline demonstrates a scalable, explainable, and fully SQL-integrated approach to anomaly detection—without relying on any external compute infrastructure.
title_zh: 在 Snowflake 中结合大语言模型、孤立森林与 SHAP 的异常检测
abstract_zh: 在现代数据驱动的系统中，检测服务器日志中的异常对于保障运行稳定性和安全性至关重要。本文提出了一种完全基于云原生的异常检测与可解释性分析流水线，该流水线完全构建于Snowflake数据平台之内。我们从公开可获取的服务器日志数据集出发，通过分阶段批量插入的方式对数据进行预处理和加载，实现高效的数据摄入。利用Snowflake原生支持的Python执行能力，我们进行特征工程并训练了Isolation Forest模型，以实现无监督的异常检测，精准识别出异常的服务器行为。通过SHAP（SHapley Additive exPlanations）值，我们对检测到的异常进行可解释性分析，识别出关键的贡献特征，并明确异常是由异常高值还是异常低值所驱动。最后，借助Snowflake Cortex的大型语言模型（LLM）能力，自动生成简洁、易于理解的人类可读洞察，便于无缝集成至分析仪表板中。该流水线展示了无需依赖任何外部计算基础设施，即可实现可扩展、可解释且完全与SQL集成的异常检测方案。

title: P4 Shield: Secure Execution of Users' P4 Programs with In-VM Information Inside Clouds
authors: Masaki Iwai, Kenichi Kourai
publish: 2026 IEEE 16th Annual Computing and Communication Workshop and Conference (CCWC)
abstract: Recently emerging programmable network switches can control packet forwarding by software, e.g., using the P4 language. For virtual machines (VMs), virtual P4 switches have been developed to execute P4 programs inside virtual switches. If users could load their own P4 programs into virtual P4 switches, it would enable custom packet forwarding using information inside their VMs. In clouds, however, users cannot fully trust virtual P4 switches, nor can virtual P4 switches trust users' P4 programs. To address these issues, this paper proposes P4 Shield for enabling the secure execution of each user's P4 programs outside clouds' virtual switches by using P4 VMs prepared per user. P4 Shield protects P4 programs from clouds by running P4 VMs as confidential VMs, whose states are protected by processors. It also protects clouds' virtual switches from users' P4 programs by confining them in uBPF sandboxes created in P4 VMs. To allow P4 programs to use information inside users' VMs, P4 Shield provides P4 external functions for accessing information in the shared memory between a P4 VM and a user's VM. We have implemented P4 Shield using Open vSwitch and confirmed its effectiveness.
title_zh: P4防护盾：在云环境中实现用户P4程序的虚拟机内信息安全执行
abstract_zh: 近年来，可编程网络交换机的出现使得通过软件（例如使用P4语言）控制数据包转发成为可能。针对虚拟机（VM），研究人员已开发出虚拟P4交换机，用于在虚拟交换机内部执行P4程序。如果用户能够将自己的P4程序加载到虚拟P4交换机中，便可以利用其虚拟机内部的信息实现自定义的数据包转发。然而，在云环境中，用户无法完全信任虚拟P4交换机，同时虚拟P4交换机也无法信任用户提交的P4程序。为解决这些问题，本文提出了一种名为P4 Shield的安全机制，通过为每个用户预先配置的P4虚拟机（P4 VM），实现用户P4程序在云虚拟交换机外部的安全执行。P4 Shield通过将P4虚拟机作为机密虚拟机运行，利用处理器提供的安全机制保护其内部状态，从而防止云平台对P4程序的泄露或篡改。同时，P4 Shield通过在P4虚拟机中创建uBPF沙箱环境，将用户P4程序限制在安全隔离的环境中，防止其对云虚拟交换机造成威胁。为了使P4程序能够访问用户虚拟机内部的信息，P4 Shield提供了P4外部函数，支持通过P4虚拟机与用户虚拟机之间的共享内存进行信息交互。我们基于Open vSwitch实现了P4 Shield，并验证了其有效性。

title: Systematic Literature Review of Explainable LLM-Powered ChatOps for CI/CD Pipeline Diagnostics and Developer Support
authors: A.M.A.D. Abeysinghe, W.M.J.I. Wijayanayake
publish: 2025 International Conference on Advances in Technology and Computing (ICATC)
abstract: This systematic literature review examines how explainable Large Language Models (LLMs) transform chat-ops applications for CI/CD pipeline diagnostics and developer support. Analyzing contemporary research from 2021–2025, this review synthesizes findings from studies on conversational AI agents, LLM-driven DevOps automation, and explainable AI techniques in software development. Key methodological approaches include Domain-Specific Languages (DSLs) for chatbot development, multi-agent orchestration frameworks, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, and two-staged LLM frameworks for detecting and remediating failures. Key findings reveal significant advancements in automating root cause analysis, orchestrating pipelines intelligently, and creating natural language interfaces for complex DevOps operations. Integrating explainable AI principles with conversational interfaces improves developer productivity, reduces mean time to resolution (MTTR), and enhances collaboration between development and operations teams. However, persistent interpretability, security governance, integration complexity, and maintaining human oversight in automated decision-making processes. This review provides a comprehensive roadmap for researchers and practitioners seeking to leverage explainable LLM-powered chat-ops solutions for enhanced CI/CD pipeline management and developer support.
title_zh: 面向CI/CD流水线诊断与开发者支持的可解释大语言模型驱动ChatOps的系统性文献综述
abstract_zh: 本系统性文献综述探讨了可解释大型语言模型（LLMs）如何变革用于CI/CD流水线诊断与开发者支持的聊天运维（chat-ops）应用。通过对2021年至2025年期间的前沿研究进行分析，本文综合了关于对话式AI代理、基于LLM的DevOps自动化以及软件开发中可解释AI技术的研究成果。主要方法论包括用于聊天机器人开发的领域特定语言（DSL）、多智能体编排框架、检索增强生成（RAG）系统，以及用于故障检测与修复的两阶段LLM框架。研究发现，这些技术显著推动了根因分析的自动化、流水线的智能编排，以及复杂DevOps操作的自然语言接口建设。将可解释AI原则与对话式界面相结合，能够有效提升开发者生产力，缩短平均修复时间（MTTR），并加强开发与运维团队之间的协作。然而，仍存在可解释性不足、安全治理挑战、系统集成复杂性，以及在自动化决策过程中维持人工监督等持续性问题。本综述为研究人员和实践者提供了一条全面的路线图，助力其利用可解释LLM驱动的chat-ops解决方案，实现更高效的CI/CD流水线管理与开发者支持。

title: CodeShield: A Hybrid AI System for Robust Code Similarity Detection and Interpretable Code Quality Analysis
authors: Abhinav Singh, Dumpa Revanth Venkata Sai, Hanoch Yedidya Karkada, S. Geetha
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent and Innovative Technologies in Computing, Electrical and Electronics (IITCEE)
abstract: In the rapidly growing digital era, code plagiarism has evolved, with subtle structural and semantic changes which are applied to evade traditional text-matching detectors. There is a growing need for tools that not only identify such changes, but also provide constructive feedback on code quality in the educational sector. CodeShield is an AI-powered system that addresses these challenges by combining text-based, abstract syntax tree (AST), and semantic similarity techniques for robust, multi-layered code similarity detection. It integrates static analysis to provide standards-based code quality feedback. Leveraging large-scale datasets like CodeSearchNet-Python, CodeShield delivers comprehensive similarity scoring and actionable insights for arbitrary Python code, enabling flexible and extensible use in both academic and professional settings.
title_zh: CodeShield：一种用于鲁棒代码相似性检测与可解释代码质量分析的混合人工智能系统
abstract_zh: 在快速发展的数字时代，代码抄袭行为不断演变，通过细微的结构和语义修改来规避传统文本匹配检测工具。教育领域迫切需要能够识别此类变化，并提供代码质量建设性反馈的工具。CodeShield 是一个基于人工智能的系统，通过结合基于文本、抽象语法树（AST）以及语义相似性技术，实现稳健且多层次的代码相似性检测，有效应对上述挑战。该系统集成静态分析功能，可提供符合标准的代码质量反馈。依托 CodeSearchNet-Python 等大规模数据集，CodeShield 能够对任意 Python 代码提供全面的相似性评分和可操作的洞察，支持在学术与专业场景中灵活、可扩展的应用。

title: Syntactic analysis and modification of smart contract code using an adapted version aimed at optimizing gas consumption in for loops
authors: Zilga Heritiana Randriamiarison, Hajarisena Razafimahatratra, Nicolas Raft Razafindrakoto, Yassine Rhazali
publish: 2025 International Conference on Electrical and Computer Engineering Researches (ICECER)
abstract: A smart contract is a program deployed on a blockchain network. It is secure, transparent, and immutable after deployment. Executing a smart contract requires gas to function. Gas is consumed during both deployment and transaction on the network. Optimizing gas consumption is one of the most difficult challenges to master. Many approaches have been proposed; however, it remains a significant a challenge. The purpose of this article is to explain gas consumption in the blockchain network and to present an approach for optimizing gas usage in a For() loop. This work was carried out in several stages, including: parsing solidity code according to its version, implementing a Control Flow Graph to identify loops to be optimized, and finally applying a smart contract code optimization algorithm. Our approach is robust, scalable, and easily adaptable. Experiments show that any syntactic or version change to a smart contract impacts gas consumption. The approach is practical and has distinctive characteristics. Its strength lies in its ability to optimize smart contracts across all solidity version from 0.5.x to 0.8.x.
title_zh: 使用改进版本的语法分析与智能合约代码修改技术，以优化for循环中的气体消耗
abstract_zh: 智能合约是部署在区块链网络上的程序。一旦部署，它就具有安全性、透明性和不可篡改性。执行智能合约需要消耗Gas。在区块链网络中，无论是部署还是交易，都会消耗Gas。优化Gas消耗是需要掌握的最具挑战性的问题之一。尽管已经提出了许多方法，但这一问题依然具有重大挑战性。本文旨在解释区块链网络中的Gas消耗机制，并提出一种优化For()循环中Gas使用的方法。本研究分几个阶段进行：根据Solidity版本解析代码，实现控制流图以识别需要优化的循环，最后应用智能合约代码优化算法。我们的方法具有鲁棒性、可扩展性，并且易于适应。实验表明，智能合约的语法或版本变化都会影响Gas消耗。该方法具有实际应用价值，具备独特特征，其优势在于能够对从0.5.x到0.8.x所有Solidity版本的智能合约进行优化。

title: Low-Latency EDMA Framework for AI-Based DSP SoCs in Multimedia Real-Time Systems
authors: Monisha R, Niharika H, Sakshi Shivakumar, Vivek Raviraj D, Bindu S, Rekha P
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent and Innovative Technologies in Computing, Electrical and Electronics (IITCEE)
abstract: Real-time multimedia systems demand highspeed data transfer with minimal latency to support continuous video, audio, and image processing. Conventional CPU-based memory transfer introduces performance bottlenecks due to processor intervention in every transaction. To overcome this, the proposed work presents a low-latency Enhanced Direct Memory Access (EDMA) framework for AI-based DSP System-on-Chip (SoC) applications. The architecture automates memory transfers through dedicated hardware logic, thereby reducing CPU load and accelerating data movement. Both CPU and EDMA modules were implemented in RTL and synthesized using Cadence Genus in 45 nm technology, with functional verification carried out in Cadence SimVision. Results show that the EDMA design achieves lower cycle counts, efficient area utilization, and reduced power consumption compared to the CPU-only approach. Proposed EDMA achieves faster and more efficient data handling while reducing processor workload with total power consumption of 62.41nW and a chip area of 950.666 <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mu \mathrm{m}^{2}$</tex> compared to the results reported in the literature. The framework demonstrates its potential for integration into highthroughput, real-time multimedia SoCs, ensuring faster data handling with minimal latency.
title_zh: 面向多媒体实时系统中基于AI的DSP SoC的低延迟EDMA框架
abstract_zh: 实时多媒体系统需要高速数据传输并具备极低延迟，以支持连续的视频、音频和图像处理。传统的基于CPU的内存传输方式由于每次事务都需要处理器介入，导致性能瓶颈。为克服这一问题，本文提出了一种低延迟的增强型直接内存访问（EDMA）框架，适用于基于人工智能的数字信号处理片上系统（AI-based DSP SoC）应用。该架构通过专用硬件逻辑自动完成内存传输，从而降低CPU负载并加速数据传输。CPU与EDMA模块均采用RTL设计，并在45 nm工艺下使用Cadence Genus进行综合，功能验证在Cadence SimVision中完成。结果表明，与仅使用CPU的方法相比，所提出的EDMA设计在周期数、面积利用率和功耗方面均表现出更优性能。该EDMA方案实现了更快、更高效的数据处理，同时显著减轻了处理器的工作负担，总功耗仅为62.41 nW，芯片面积为950.666 μm²，优于文献中报道的现有成果。该框架展现出在高吞吐量、实时多媒体SoC中集成的巨大潜力，能够实现低延迟、快速的数据处理。

title: Deep Learning Approach for IoT Vulnerability Severity Prediction
authors: Samira A. Baho, Jemal H. Abawajy
publish: 2025 International Conference on Advances in Machine Intelligence, and Cybersecurity Technologies (AMICT)
abstract: The proliferation of Internet of Things (IoT) devices has introduced a vast and complex attack surface, making efficient management and prioritization of vulnerabilities a critical cybersecurity challenge. Fast and accurate assessment of IoT vulnerability severity level is essential for effective prioritization and management of security risks. However, manual evaluation remains time-consuming, error-prone, and increasingly unsustainable given the rapid growth of IoT-specific vulnerabilities. This paper presents a novel approach that leverages a transfer learning model to automatically predict the severity of IoT vulnerabilities based on their textual descriptions, by leveraging the rich semantic information in vulnerability reports. This solution allows us to address the common issue of data scarcity in specialized domains like IoT security. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model significantly outperforms traditional machine learning techniques, achieving high accuracy of 91.5 and F1-scores of 0.90 in severity classification. This enables security teams to rapidly assess and prioritize vulnerabilities, thereby enhancing proactive defense measures and optimizing resource allocation in complex IoT environments.
title_zh: 基于深度学习的物联网漏洞严重性预测方法
abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）设备的迅速普及带来了庞大而复杂的攻击面，使得漏洞的高效管理与优先级排序成为关键的网络安全挑战。快速且准确地评估物联网漏洞的严重程度，对于有效进行安全风险的优先级排序与管理至关重要。然而，由于物联网特定漏洞数量的快速增长，传统的手动评估方式已变得耗时、易出错，且日益难以持续。本文提出了一种创新方法，利用迁移学习模型，基于漏洞报告的文本描述自动预测物联网漏洞的严重等级，充分挖掘漏洞报告中丰富的语义信息。该方法有效解决了物联网安全等专业领域常见的数据稀缺问题。实验结果表明，所提出的模型显著优于传统机器学习方法，在严重程度分类任务中分别达到了91.5%的准确率和0.90的F1分数。该技术使安全团队能够快速评估并优先处理漏洞，从而提升主动防御能力，并在复杂的物联网环境中优化资源分配。

title: Efficient Hardware Implementation of Eigen Solver
authors: Uday Korat, Amirhossein Alimohammad
publish: 2026 IEEE 16th Annual Computing and Communication Workshop and Conference (CCWC)
abstract: Eigen analysis is a fundamental module in many real time signal processing algorithms. This article presents the hardware architecture design and implemen-tation of a vector based high-throughput parameterizable eigen solver. The proposed design calculates an eigen values and vectors based on the QR algorithm. The QR algorithm works really well for small dense matrices and it works as additive method in projection for large matrix eigen analysis. This paper presents parallel vector based computational units for eigen solver using basic QR algorithm. The QR decomposition is implemented based on the Givens-CORDIC algorithm and the matrix multiplication of matrices <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{Q}$</tex> and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{R}$</tex> is based on parallel vector products. The Eigen Solver is synthesized on Xilinx Virtex-7 for a real-valued matrices of size <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$4\times 4,8\times 8$</tex> and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$16\times 16$</tex>.
title_zh: 特征值求解器的高效硬件实现
abstract_zh: 特征值分析是许多实时信号处理算法中的基础模块。本文提出了一种基于向量的高吞吐量可参数化特征值求解器的硬件架构设计与实现。所提出的方案基于QR算法计算特征值和特征向量。QR算法在处理小规模稠密矩阵时表现优异，同时在大规模矩阵特征分析的投影计算中可作为累加方法使用。本文采用基于基本QR算法的并行向量计算单元来实现特征值求解器。QR分解基于Givens-CORDIC算法实现，而矩阵Q与R的矩阵乘法则基于并行向量乘积完成。该特征值求解器已在Xilinx Virtex-7平台上进行综合，针对实数矩阵的尺寸分别为4×4、8×8和16×16。

title: Extending Delta Debugging Minimization for Spectrum-Based Fault Localization
authors: Charaka Geethal Kapugama
publish: 2026 IEEE 16th Annual Computing and Communication Workshop and Conference (CCWC)
abstract: This paper introduces DDMIN-LOC, a technique that combines Delta Debugging Minimization (DDMIN) with Spectrum-Based Fault Localization (SBFL). It can be applied to programs taking string inputs, even when only a single failure-inducing input is available. DDMIN is an algorithm that systematically explores the minimal failure-inducing input that exposes a bug, given an initial failing input. However, it does not provide information about the faulty statements responsible for the failure. DDMIN-LOC addresses this limitation by collecting the passing and failing inputs generated during the DDMIN process and computing suspiciousness scores for program statements and predicates using SBFL algorithms. These scores are then combined to rank statements according to their likelihood of being faulty. DDMIN-LOC requires only one failing input of the buggy program, although it can be applied only to programs that take string inputs. DDMIN-LOC was evaluated on 136 programs selected from the QuixBugs and Codeflaws benchmarks using the SBFL algorithms Tarantula, Ochiai, GenProg, Jaccard and DStar. Experimental results show that DDMIN-LOC performs best with Jaccard: in most subjects, fewer than 20% executable lines need to be examined to locate the faulty statements. Moreover, in most subjects, faulty statements are ranked within the top 3 positions in all the generated test suites derived from different failing inputs.
title_zh: 扩展的Delta调试最小化方法在基于谱的故障定位中的应用
abstract_zh:
本文提出了一种名为DDMIN-LOC的技术，该技术将Delta Debugging Minimization（DDMIN）与基于谱的故障定位（SBFL）相结合。该方法可应用于接收字符串输入的程序，即使仅有一个导致失败的输入也可使用。DDMIN是一种系统化探索暴露缺陷的最小失败输入的算法，给定一个初始的失败输入后，能够逐步缩小输入规模。然而，DDMIN本身无法提供导致失败的错误语句信息。DDMIN-LOC通过在DDMIN执行过程中收集通过和失败的输入，利用SBFL算法为程序语句和谓词计算可疑度得分，并将这些得分综合起来，按语句可能出错的概率进行排序，从而弥补了DDMIN的这一不足。

DDMIN-LOC仅需一个存在缺陷程序的失败输入即可运行，但其适用范围仅限于接收字符串输入的程序。本文在QuixBugs和Codeflaws基准测试集中的136个程序上对DDMIN-LOC进行了评估，采用的SBFL算法包括Tarantula、Ochiai、GenProg、Jaccard和DStar。实验结果表明，DDMIN-LOC在使用Jaccard算法时表现最佳：在大多数测试案例中，只需检查少于20%的可执行代码行，即可定位到错误语句。此外，在大多数情况下，错误语句在由不同失败输入生成的所有测试用例集中，均能排在前3名之内。

title: TAMO-FoA: Tool-Augmented AIOps for Reliable RCA in Cloud-Native Systems
authors: Akshay Mittal, Krishna Kandi, Rafiuddin Syed, Sagar Mahajan
publish: 2026 IEEE 16th Annual Computing and Communication Workshop and Conference (CCWC)
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for Root Cause Analysis (RCA) in cloud-native systems but suffer from hallucinations, context constraints, and dynamic dependency misunderstandings. This paper presents TAMO-FoA (ToolAugmented Multimodal Operations Framework for AIOps), a comprehensive framework addressing these limitations through four key innovations: tool-augmented perception, SOP-guided reasoning, specialized hallucination detection, and multi-modal fusion. Our framework integrates a hybrid multi-modal encoder combining 1D-CNN, BERT+LSTM, and GNN architectures with diffusion-based fusion for temporal causality preservation across heterogeneous telemetry data. The SOP-enhanced ReAct agent incorporates Standard Operating Procedures to guide diagnostic workflows and reduce irrelevant tool calls by 42%. Our novel HDM-2 hallucination detector employs dual verification mechanisms achieving 21% relative improvement in F1 scores over existing approaches. Experimental evaluation on real-world microservice failures demonstrates 17.2% accuracy improvement and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$2.3 \times$</tex> token efficiency gains compared to baseline methods. A 3-month production deployment achieved 76.3% root cause identification accuracy with 34% reduction in mean time to resolution. TAMO-FoA provides a concrete path toward dependable AgentOps for self-healing cloud infrastructures, with complete implementation publicly available at https://github.com/akshaymittal143/TAMO-FoA.
title_zh: TAMO-FoA：面向云原生系统的工具增强型AIOps可靠根因分析
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在云原生系统中的根本原因分析（RCA）方面展现出巨大潜力，但仍然面临幻觉、上下文限制以及对动态依赖关系理解不足等问题。本文提出了一种名为TAMO-FoA（面向AIOps的工具增强多模态运维框架）的综合性框架，通过四项关键创新有效解决了上述局限：工具增强感知、SOP引导推理、专用幻觉检测以及多模态融合。该框架采用混合多模态编码器，结合一维卷积神经网络（1D-CNN）、BERT+LSTM与图神经网络（GNN）架构，并引入基于扩散的融合机制，以在异构遥测数据中保持时间因果关系。SOP增强型ReAct智能体通过引入标准操作流程（SOP）来指导诊断流程，使无关工具调用减少了42%。我们提出的新型HDM-2幻觉检测器采用双重验证机制，在F1分数上相比现有方法实现了21%的相对提升。在真实世界微服务故障数据上的实验评估表明，与基线方法相比，TAMO-FoA在准确率上提升了17.2%，同时在token使用效率上提高了2.3倍。在为期三个月的生产环境部署中，该框架实现了76.3%的根本原因识别准确率，并将平均故障解决时间（MTTR）降低了34%。TAMO-FoA为实现可信赖的AgentOps、构建自愈型云基础设施提供了切实可行的路径，完整实现代码已公开发布于 https://github.com/akshaymittal143/TAMO-FoA。

title: Text to SQL AI Agentic Workflow Implementations: A Systematic Literature Review
authors: Eranda De Silva, Dinesh Asanka
publish: 2025 International Conference on Advances in Technology and Computing (ICATC)
abstract: This study comprehensively examines recent advancements and persistent challenges in the development of Text-to-SQL systems, specifically focusing on the integration of agentic workflows with a RAG or Graph-Retrieval Augmented Generation (Graph-RAG) approach. The core task of translating natural language queries into Structured Query Language (SQL) statements aims to democratize data access. However, existing methods, including standalone Large Language Models (LLMs), frequently exhibit limitations related to the ambiguity of natural language, the complexity of real-world database schemas, and the generation of factually incorrect or syntactically invalid SQL. This review synthesizes the literature to demonstrate how multi-agentic frameworks with RAG and Graph-RAG architectures address these issues. The decomposition of complex queries into sub-tasks including intent classification, schema linking, and error corrections posited to enhance the system's flexibility, generalization capabilities, and overall reliability. Concurrently, the RAG and Graph-RAG database context approach offers a promising method for grounding LLMs with high-fidelity, structured, and contextual information. By leveraging vector databases or knowledge graphs to represent database schemas and domain-specific knowledge, these RAG systems augment the LLM’s prompt, thereby mitigating hallucinations and improving the accuracy of the generated SQL. TigerVector illustrates the potential of hybrid retrieval methods that combine semantic and relational search within a single graph database, enabling multi-hop reasoning crucial for handling complex enterprise and financial datasets. Despite these advancements, several challenges remain, notably the automation of creating effective, LLM-friendly database representations and achieving fully autonomous continual learning. Future research should focus on fortifying security protocols to facilitate the robust and scalable Text-to-SQL AI Agentic Graph-RAG workflows.
title_zh: 文本到SQL AI代理工作流实现：一项系统性文献综述
abstract_zh: 本研究全面审视了文本到SQL系统在近期发展中的进展与持续存在的挑战，特别聚焦于将智能体工作流与检索增强生成（RAG）或图谱检索增强生成（Graph-RAG）方法相结合的应用。将自然语言查询转化为结构化查询语言（SQL）的核心任务，旨在实现数据访问的民主化。然而，现有方法，包括独立的大型语言模型（LLMs），在自然语言的歧义性、现实世界数据库模式的复杂性，以及生成事实错误或语法无效SQL方面仍存在诸多局限。本文综述了相关文献，展示了多智能体框架结合RAG与Graph-RAG架构如何有效应对上述问题。通过将复杂查询分解为意图识别、模式链接和错误修正等子任务，系统在灵活性、泛化能力及整体可靠性方面得以显著提升。同时，RAG与Graph-RAG所采用的数据库上下文方法，为将LLM与高保真、结构化且上下文相关的知识进行有效结合提供了极具前景的解决方案。通过利用向量数据库或知识图谱来表示数据库模式与领域特定知识，这些RAG系统能够增强LLM的提示信息，从而减少幻觉现象，提升生成SQL的准确性。TigerVector展示了混合检索方法的潜力，该方法在单一图数据库中融合语义搜索与关系搜索，支持多跳推理，对处理复杂的企事业及金融数据集尤为关键。尽管取得了显著进展，仍存在若干挑战，尤其是如何自动化构建对LLM友好的高效数据库表示，以及实现完全自主的持续学习。未来的研究应着重加强安全协议，以推动Text-to-SQL智能体图谱-RAG工作流在实际应用中的稳健性与可扩展性。

title: Binary Flaw Detection: A Security Analysis Paper
authors: Fahad Amin
publish: 2025 International Conference on Advances in Machine Intelligence, and Cybersecurity Technologies (AMICT)
abstract: We propose a novel, scalable framework for overlapping community detection designed for vulnerability localization in binary code graphs. The framework is an algorithmic pipeline ("Candidate + Refine") that (i) generates compact overlapping community seeds, (ii) refines m embership using an objective that balances intra-community density and overlap sparsity, and (iii) reconciles boundary communities in a distributed setting. We evaluate the approach on standard benchmarks (DBLP, LiveJournal, YouTube) and LFR synthetic graphs, and report consistent improvements in extended NMI (+6–12%) and end-to-end runtime (6 hours on YouTube vs. 10–48 hours for baseline methods). We also provide ROC / precision‚ Äìrecall analyses, runtime scalability plots, and visual examples of detected communities to aid interpretability. Code and artifact details are provided in the supplementary material.
title_zh: 二进制漏洞检测：一篇安全分析论文
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖且可扩展的重叠社区检测框架，专为二进制代码图中的漏洞定位而设计。该框架是一个算法流程（“候选 + 优化”），包含三个步骤：(i) 生成紧凑的重叠社区种子；(ii) 通过平衡社区内部紧密度与重叠稀疏性的目标函数来优化成员归属；(iii) 在分布式环境下协调边界社区。我们在标准基准数据集（DBLP、LiveJournal、YouTube）以及LFR合成图上评估了该方法，结果表明在扩展NMI指标上实现了稳定提升（+6%–12%），端到端运行时间显著缩短（YouTube数据集上仅需6小时，而基线方法需10–48小时）。此外，我们还提供了ROC曲线、精确率-召回率分析、运行时间可扩展性图表以及检测到的社区的可视化示例，以增强结果的可解释性。代码及实验资源详情见附录材料。

title: Design and Verification of a Glitch-Filtered Clock Gating Controller Using System Verilog
authors: Shriniketana Kalale, Subodh Kumar Panda, Manjunath G Asuti, Sudarshan D
publish: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent and Innovative Technologies in Computing, Electrical and Electronics (IITCEE)
abstract: Dynamic Power reduction is a critical design aspect in modern FPGA based digital systems and SoC's. Clock gating is a widely implemented technique in reducing dynamic power consumption by disabling the clock toggles during inactive period of the system. However, conventional clock gating techniques do not offer a mechanism to filter the glitches which are present in the input signals. The proposed work offers a solution to overcome the glitches and optimizes the dynamic power consumption. The design is synthesized in the Cadence environment using 90 nm technology. The design is verified using a System Verilog based test-bench with randomized input pulses to validate the filtered signal and gated clock behaviour. The optimized area and dynamic power achieved are <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$128.556 \mu \mathrm{m}^{2}$</tex> and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$2.68 \mu \mathrm{W}$</tex> respectively. This methodology can be effectively utilized in FPGA and SoC based designs to enhance energy efficiency and improve overall system reliability, making it highly suitable for complex digital applications.
title_zh: 基于System Verilog的毛刺滤波时钟门控控制器的设计与验证
abstract_zh: 动态功耗降低是现代基于FPGA的数字系统和片上系统（SoC）设计中的关键考虑因素。时钟门控是一种广泛采用的技术，通过在系统处于非活动期间禁用时钟翻转来减少动态功耗。然而，传统的时钟门控技术缺乏对输入信号中存在毛刺的过滤机制。本文提出了一种解决方案，能够有效消除毛刺并进一步优化动态功耗。该设计在Cadence环境下采用90纳米工艺进行综合，并通过基于System Verilog的测试平台，使用随机输入脉冲对设计进行验证，以确认滤波后信号和门控时钟的行为正确性。最终实现的优化面积和动态功耗分别为128.556 μm²和2.68 μW。该方法可有效应用于FPGA和SoC设计中，显著提升能效并增强系统整体可靠性，因此特别适用于复杂的数字应用场景。

title: Automated Software Test Case Generation Using Directional Partially Weighted Ensemble Large Language Models with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
authors: Wantana Sisomboon, Jakkrit Kaewyotha, Wararat Songpan
abstract: Ensuring software quality relies on testing practices that can reliably confirm whether delivered systems meet user requirements. While Acceptance Test-Driven Development (ATDD) encourages early collaboration between stakeholders and developers, creating comprehensive acceptance test cases remains a human task that heavily depends on domain expertise. Recent progress in Large Language Models (LLMs) has made automated test case generation feasible. However, approaches based on a single model often suffer from performance instability, uneven test coverage, and a limited ability to generalize across heterogeneous requirements. This study proposes an automated test case generation framework that combines directional partially weighted ensemble large language models (LLMs) with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). The framework assigns model influence dynamically according to directional performance trends and degrees of partial correctness and consolidates candidate outputs through a weighted majority-voting mechanism and cross-validation conducted over multiple folds. Five state-of-the-art LLMs, Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Qwen, and Mistral, were evaluated using 16 criteria derived from four widely adopted black box testing techniques: Boundary Value Analysis, Equivalence Partitioning, Use Case testing, and State Transition testing. Under the evaluated experimental conditions, the proposed framework achieved 100% test coverage, indicating complete consistency with the defined gold-standard acceptance criteria. Cross-validation results further demonstrate improved robustness, stronger generalization to previously unseen requirements, and linear scalability, supporting practical deployment in real-world software development environments, and complexity analysis to confirm linear throughout growth (O(n)), which supports efficient deployment under increasing workloads.
title_zh: 基于检索增强生成（RAG）的定向部分加权集成大语言模型的自动化软件测试用例生成
abstract_zh: 确保软件质量依赖于能够可靠验证交付系统是否满足用户需求的测试实践。尽管验收测试驱动开发（ATDD）促进了利益相关者与开发人员之间的早期协作，但创建全面的验收测试用例仍然是高度依赖领域专业知识的人工任务。近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）的发展使得自动化测试用例生成成为可能。然而，基于单一模型的方法通常存在性能不稳定、测试覆盖不均以及在异构需求间泛化能力有限等问题。本研究提出了一种结合方向性部分加权集成大型语言模型（LLMs）与检索增强生成（RAG）的自动化测试用例生成框架。该框架根据模型的方向性性能趋势和部分正确程度动态分配模型影响力，并通过加权多数投票机制及多折交叉验证整合候选输出。研究采用五种前沿LLM（Claude、ChatGPT、Gemini、Qwen和Mistral），依据四种广泛采用的黑盒测试技术——边界值分析、等价类划分、用例测试和状态转换测试——提取的16项标准进行评估。在所设定的实验条件下，所提框架实现了100%的测试覆盖率，表明其与预设的黄金标准验收准则完全一致。交叉验证结果进一步证明了该框架具备更强的鲁棒性、对未见需求的更好泛化能力以及线性可扩展性，支持其在真实软件开发环境中的实际部署。复杂度分析确认了其整体吞吐量呈线性增长（O(n)），在工作负载不断增加的情况下仍能保持高效部署。

title: DiffSBOM: Capturing Semantic Changes in Software Upgrades for Supply Chain Transparency
authors: Runbin Yuan, Haoxiang Yang, Yuchen Zhang
publish: 2026 IEEE 16th Annual Computing and Communication Workshop and Conference (CCWC)
abstract: Software Bills of Materials (SBOMs) are critical for tracking dependencies in modern software systems, but they typically lack semantic detail about how components evolve across versions. This limits their usefulness for understanding upgrade impacts, assessing regressions, and supporting secure supply chain practices. We introduce DiffSBOM, a lightweight and extensible framework that enriches standard SBOMs with function-level semantic differences between versions. DiffSBOM leverages existing tools to extract and embed meaningful change information into SBOMs using a structured “upgrade” field. The framework operates without source code instrumentation or custom configuration, making it suitable for developers, auditors, and security teams. We evaluate DiffSBOM on 20 open-source projects written in C, Rust, Golang, and Python, demonstrating its scalability, usability, and minimal performance overhead. DiffSBOM produces compact, backward-compatible SBOMs that enhance transparency and reduce upgrade risks. As part of future work, we aim to integrate DiffSBOM's fine-grained upgrade insights with platforms such as GitHub Dependabot, enabling more informative update notifications and proactive vulnerability management.
title_zh: DiffSBOM：捕捉软件升级中的语义变化以实现供应链透明
abstract_zh: 软件物料清单（SBOM）对于追踪现代软件系统中的依赖关系至关重要，但通常缺乏关于组件在不同版本间演进的语义信息。这限制了其在理解升级影响、评估回归问题以及支持安全供应链实践方面的实用性。我们提出了 DiffSBOM，一个轻量且可扩展的框架，能够将版本间的函数级语义差异信息丰富到标准 SBOM 中。DiffSBOM 利用现有工具提取并嵌入有意义的变更信息到 SBOM 中，通过结构化的“升级”字段实现。该框架无需源代码插桩或自定义配置，适用于开发者、审计人员和安全团队。我们在 20 个使用 C、Rust、Golang 和 Python 编写的开源项目上评估了 DiffSBOM，证明了其良好的可扩展性、易用性以及极低的性能开销。DiffSBOM 生成紧凑且向后兼容的 SBOM，提升了透明度并降低了升级风险。作为未来工作的一部分，我们计划将 DiffSBOM 提供的细粒度升级洞察集成到 GitHub Dependabot 等平台，以实现更丰富的更新通知和主动的漏洞管理。
